title: VOICE Restoration Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
subjects: Social work, volunteer service, charitable organizations
crs_summary: Victims Of Immigration Crime Engagement Restoration Act or the VOICE Restoration Act This bill establishes the Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement Office within U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement. The office shall provide assistance to victims of crimes committed by non-U.S. nationals ( aliens under federal law) who are present in the United States without lawful immigration status.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
